name: Circuito RL
description: Calcula la constante de tiempo de un circuito RL.
seo_description: Calcula la constante de tiempo de un circuito RL. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Con conversion de unidades integrada.
example_label: Calculate the time constant and final current for an RL circuit with L=0.5 H and R=25 Ω.
result_context: The time constant {tau} s determines how fast current reaches final value {current_final} A.
formula_display: Ïâ€ž = L ÷ R,  I_final = V ÷ R (assuming V = 10V)
steps: Inductance L = 0.5 H, Resistance R = 25 Ω
mistakes: Confusing RL with RC time constant formula
Not understanding that current reaches 63% in one time constant
Forgetting that inductor opposes current change
